# AutoSensy

AutoSensy is a WhatsApp marketing automation platform for campaigns, chatbot workflows, team inbox routing, WhatsApp forms, payments, customer follow-ups, and WhatsApp Business API communication.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://autosensy.in/
- Features: https://autosensy.in/features
- Use Cases: https://autosensy.in/use-cases
- Pricing: https://autosensy.in/pricing
- Contact: https://autosensy.in/contact
- About: https://autosensy.in/about
- FAQs: https://autosensy.in/faq
- WhatsApp Marketing Automation: https://autosensy.in/whatsapp-marketing-automation
- WhatsApp Business API: https://autosensy.in/whatsapp-business-api
- WhatsApp Chatbot: https://autosensy.in/whatsapp-chatbot
- WhatsApp Broadcast Campaigns: https://autosensy.in/whatsapp-broadcast-campaigns
- WhatsApp Team Inbox: https://autosensy.in/whatsapp-team-inbox

## Industry Pages

- Ecommerce WhatsApp Automation: https://autosensy.in/industries/ecommerce-whatsapp-automation
- Education WhatsApp Automation: https://autosensy.in/industries/education-whatsapp-automation
- Real Estate WhatsApp Automation: https://autosensy.in/industries/real-estate-whatsapp-automation

- Healthcare WhatsApp Automation: https://autosensy.in/industries/healthcare-whatsapp-automation
- Travel WhatsApp Automation: https://autosensy.in/industries/travel-whatsapp-automation
